documentation_impact.rationale: The implement stage completes active-memory context economy pass 2 handbook routes, active-memory files, ADR-0006, AGENTS.md slimming, six narrowed Cursor rule projections, indexing policy, context-budget tooling, backlog linkage, and slice-7 governance artifacts. PRD.md, BOOTSTRAP.md, persona spec files, and the ratified Engineering Spec were intentionally not modified during implement. README.md gained one key-path pointer to src/memory/active/current.md for operator orientation.

deferred-items.rationale: Physical migration of src/work/** and src/memory/** remains out of scope until a slice ships shims, tests, manifest, reference updates, and rollback notes per the ratified Engineering Spec.
Executable soft-budget warnings stay deferred because pass 2 ships documented budgets and tier reporting only.
Owner ratification may still be required for any mirrored rule glob that the audit could not narrow safely; the rule-audit artifact records prior and new globs per plan.
